title: Certified Tail Bounds for Prime-Power Threshold Cutoff Sequences: Verification Artifact
description: Verification artifact for the paper Certified Tail Bounds for Prime-Power Threshold Cutoff Sequences. The artifact contains the paper source and PDF, a frozen threshold certificate, a standalone deterministic C++17 exact-integer verifier, build instructions, and SHA256 hashes. The verifier recomputes the finite-prefix rows from the cutoff definition and checks the threshold-83 tail certificate without floating-point arithmetic or exploratory search code.
